text: The commissioner shall establish and implement a comprehensive pilot program to review and study the use of the internet for the administration and completion of an approved pre-licensing course as required by subparagraph (i) of paragraph (a) of subdivision four of § 502 (Requirements for licensing) . * NB Repealed June 30, 2030

# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 3
#### Article 12
##### § 399-P — Pre-licensing course internet pilot program

The commissioner shall establish and implement a comprehensive pilot program to review and study the use of the internet for the administration and completion of an approved pre-licensing course as required by subparagraph (i) of paragraph (a) of subdivision four of § 502 (Requirements for licensing) . * NB Repealed June 30, 2030

*Last modified: May 16, 2025*
